SUPABASE_URL.where: n8n Environment Variables (Settings > Variables) OR edit the URL expressions in: Fetch Recent Messages, Insert Claud3 Reply, Insert Fallback Reply

SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY.where: n8n Credential — create a new 'Header Auth' credential named exactly 'Supabase Service Key'. Set Header Name = 'Authorization', Header Value = 'Bearer <your-service-role-key>'
SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY.notes: Used in nodes: Fetch Recent Messages, Insert Claud3 Reply, Insert Fallback Reply. The apikey header is set separately from the same credential value.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.where: Already wired to existing credential 'Anthropic account' (ID: kBlXWWkHqdKURUJ7). No action needed unless that credential is missing the key.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.notes: Used in node: Call Claude API

webhookUrl.notes: Point your Supabase Database Webhook at the PRODUCTION URL. The test URL only works when the workflow is open in the editor and you click 'Listen for Test Event'.
